You done good, boss. What's next?
Yeah, that's what I was hoping you'd say. The Packs all in!
Uh... yeah, okay, boss. See you around, I guess?
Haha!  You can't escape the lure of caps and mayhem. You're in the chase for life. Like the rest of us.
We keep going. We take over more settlements in the Commonwealth. We take what we want, and we keep taking until we own everything.
Oh, and, let me make something clear. I appreciate what you've done. But don't go thinking we're friends. We ain't.
I'd still happily kill you if enough caps were involved.
You gave those Disciples a real blood bath.
You gave those Operators a real blood bath.
So, how's it feel to get revenge?
Once they turned, there was no going back. You did what you had to do.
I've been waiting for them to get theirs for a very long time.
Oooh, that's cold. Can't say I blame you though. They won't be missed around here, that's for sure.
I'd have done the exact same thing... except, maybe I'd a done it sooner, and make them suffer a little more.
We are now arriving at the station. Please be sure to collect any children and personal belongings before exiting the Nuka-Express.
Hello and on behalf of the Nuka-Cola Corporation, we'd like to welcome each and every one of you aboard the Nuka-Express Monorail.
For your own safety, please remain seated or utilize the provided handrails while the train is in motion.
If you'll direct your attention to the right side of the monorail, you can observe Nuka-World's famous Fizztop Mountain.
Standing at over 100 meters tall, Fizztop Mountain is the largest man-made structure in Nuka-World, and features the five-star Fizztop Grille.
From Nuka-Town U.S.A., you can access any one of our five individually-themed parks.
Experience the future at the Galactic Zone, or relive the Wild West at Dry Rock Gulch.
Take a tour through the Nuka-Cola Bottling Plant or visit Kiddie Kingdom and meet the whole Nuka-Family.
And finally, for the nature lover in you, travel to Safari Adventure and delight in over 100 different animal species from around the world.
Coming up is the heart of Nuka-World, Nuka-Town U.S.A., featuring the Cola-Cars arena, the Bradberton Amphitheater, and The Parlor Dinner Theater.
And kids, don't forget to tell your parents to bring you to the Nuka-Cade where you can play games and earn tickets to win fabulous prizes.
Nuka-World would also like to take this time to remind our loyal customers that we're only open for a few more weeks in October.
Don't miss out on one last chance to see Nuka and Cappy before we close our gates for the winter season.
Here at Nuka-World, we value your feedback as a loyal customer.
We encourage you to send any suggestions on how we may improve your experience to our Customer Service department at our corporate headquarters.
We hope you enjoyed your visit to Nuka-World and continue to have a safe trip home.
Remember, the Nuka-Cola Corporation is not responsible for any lost, stolen, or damaged items during your stay.
Please stand clear of the doors.
Por favor, mantengase alejado de las puertas.
No one investigates that signal until this place is secure.
If I see anyone violate protocol and enter that transit station before we're set, I'll have your head.
Now pick up the pace. I want to be able to report back to Cypress ASAP!
Come on, you're just wasting my time!
Let's get this over with. I got work to do.
Who's in charge around here? I'll tear their heart out!
I want the head of whoever's running this shitshow brought to me on a plate!
I'm here to give your god damn idiot leader a piece of my mind! Now where are they?!
You all deaf or something? Where. The. Fuck. Is. Your. Boss!
Don't you fucking dare walk away from me! Kill them!
So, are you the Nuka-World asshole that thought you could waltz your people into my territory?
Are you fucking kidding me?! I will wear your bones! Kill them!
Woah. Easy. T-take it, easy, all right? Sure. Just, uh, keep it. Place was a shit hole anyway.
You talk to me like that?! Kill 'em!
To hell with that. We got enough trouble from the other gangs around here poaching our scores. Ain't no room for another crew.
Now explain to me why I shouldn't just gut you?
You! You the Nuka-World wastepile that thought you could move your gang into Sinner's territory and live?
You give me one good reason I shouldn't slice you open and eat your heart right here?
You can keep that pit. We're... not interested.
Well, look who stopped by. Care to lend a hand?
Got a job. I think it'll interest you.
Hey, I got something you'll want to look into.
I got a little something you'd be perfect for.
Looking a little bored there, boss. I got just the thing to cure that.
You look like you could use something to do, and I got just the thing.
There you are. I need you to make some time for a job.
Busy? I have something else for you.
I got another job for you, if you're interested.
If you have more free time, I can use it.
Got something else lined up. You want in?
The Disciples could use you for something else. Think you can handle it?
Got another thing, if you want in.
I got something else, as usual. Interested?
Something else came up, of course. Are you up for it?
Someone out there's making threats, and needs to be neutered. Metaphorically.
A certain individual is challenging my authority out in the Commonwealth. There's a simple way to teach them respect.
Some idiot's trying to stir up trouble. I think you should show everyone how the Disciples keep trouble makers in line.
They think they've got some powerful ally. Why don't you prove them wrong - and make that powerful ally ours.
They recruited some ally out in the Commonwealth. But you know how fickle alliances can be.
They've made a friend of an old acquaintance of mine I haven't seen in quite some time. I think it's time we caught up.
I got a name on a list of potential "allies" I want you to escort back here.
They say keep your friends close and your enemies closer. Well, there's someone I need right by my side.
I think it's time someone learned just how serious we can be.
Take this Shock Collar, sneak up, and snap it on when she isn't looking. Or, beat her senseless, my preference, then snap it on.
Take this Shock Collar, sneak up, and snap it on when he isn't looking. Or, beat him to a bloody pulp, my preference, then snap it on.
Apparently, one of our own has grown a conscience and tried to sneak out without facing the consequences.
Sadly, someone there turned traitor, and as you may know, all traitors must be taught a lesson.
Oddly, someone disobeyed a direct order. It's rare, so it's time to remind people just how personally I take it.
Some dealer rather do business with anyone but us. As if we wouldn't notice. You're going to make that dealer regret living.
Some wastelander decided to go into the information selling business. You're going to go make sure that career choice is short lived.
An old client has taken business elsewhere. It's something that can't go unpunished.
There's a trader that ripped off one of our outposts. An example must be made.
An old trader thinks it's fine to badmouth us. Death is probably too good for this one. I think it's time for a little public shaming.
I got a little... problem out in the Commonwealth. You're going to solve it, and make sure no one else gets any ideas.
They're saying one of our own grew a conscience and tried to leave. Everyone knows if you want out, you pay with your life.
We've got a traitor down there, and I'm feeling merciful. And by merciful, I mean skipping the torture and going straight to death.
Someone decided to act without my approval, and as punishment, I decided to spare the collar and go straight for the execution.
Some trader is selling information on us. A poor life choice, especially if you're going to get caught. Time to learn the hard way.
Some wastelander's selling secrets about us, but not for long. Just don't make it too quick. It's more satisfying when suffering is involved.
Somehow they managed to take one of my clients. No one cuts ties with me and lives.
Some trader tried to make a shit deal, then accused us of being unfair. I think death is a pretty fair response, don't you?
Some old trader thinks it's okay to trash our good name. I'm thinking you take the tongue before you take the life.
There's some unfinished business in the Commonwealth. The kind that demands bloodshed, and lots of it.
They got a pretty good stash of supplies right now, but some outsiders want to make it theirs. I want you to make sure that doesn't happen.
They scored some supplies, but now some other group is making threats to hand them over... and no one threatens me and gets away with it.
They had a caravan get ambushed. I trust they can handle it, but I want those supplies and I want them now.
My scouts found an old cache and attracted a little too much attention celebrating. Go make sure they hang on to it and it and it doesn't happen again.
One of our supply runs got ambushed. I'm sure they can manage, but I want a little insurance, just in case.
Some trade deal's gone south. I want you to go make sure we keep what's ours and take what's theirs, along with their sad little lives.
Apparently, some nearby neighbors aren't big on sharing when it comes to supplies. So we're just going to take them.
They ran out of supplies, but I happen to know the perfect place to get them restocked.
Some other settlement thinks they need their supplies more than we do. Luckily, no one needs supplies when they're dead.
Some traders don't believe in finders keepers when it comes to stealing. It's time to put them in their place.
We've got word of some supplies we could use, and I'm never really in the negotiating mood. So you're just going to take it.
Some outpost is too high and mighty to trade with us. You'd think they'd be thankful we even tried. Now we'll just kill them and take what we want.
There's a place nearby with supplies just waiting to be ours. Some may disagree, but I'm sure you won't let them live long enough to argue.
Just some Super Mutants. Nothing you can't handle.
Raiders. Like they stand a chance.
The Brotherhood of Steel. You'll be doing the world a favor.
Only the Brotherhood. Have at it.
A handful of Minutemen. A kid could do this job.
Just those annoying Minutemen.
Gunners. Put 'em in their place.
Railroad "agents." Sticking their nose where it doesn't belong.
The Institute. They won't know what hit 'em.
Some nobody. I'm practically giving you this one.
Just some annoying idiot. Should be easy for you.
There's no way you're done already. Don't forget you have a job to do.
Don't you have a little task to take care of?
Isn't there a job you're supposed to be doing?
That's not what it looks like to me. You want to slack off, do it on your own time. Get out there and get it done.
Is that so? You've got a funny way of showing it because I'm pretty sure your job isn't here in Nuka-World.
I trust you'll get it done soon if you want to continue running this place.
If you don't think you can handle it... you can tell me. Maybe you'd rather be slumming it with the traders?
I have plenty of Disciples who'd leap at the chance to get out there and cut some throats. I'm surprised you don't share their... enthusiasm.
I got word from one of our outposts.
One of our outposts sent word.
Some outpost apparently can't handle its own.
An outpost in the Commonwealth put a call out.
One of the outposts is having some... trouble.
I was just thinking how very boring and dull the Operators' lives must be, and thought we could spice it up a bit for them.
I think it's about time we made things more interesting for the Operators.
I was just thinking about our dear friends in the Pack.
I think it's about time the Pack learned a few lessons.
Good. I need a sure thing on this.
Don't think I won't remember this.
With an attitude like that, I don't see you hanging around here too long.
Maybe you should think about who you're talking to next time.
I get it. Can't handle a little job.
You're seriously saying no? I think Gage and I need to have a little chat.
Oh, I'm sorry, I didn't mean to offend you by offering a job you couldn't handle.
And here I thought you were capable of making decisions.
Hope that doesn't mean you're scared.
Not interested in fun, I see. That's too bad.
Really? The longer you stand here, the more you look like Colter.
Can't make a decision? Makes me wonder what else you can't do.
Someone out there's making threats, and needs to be cut down to size. Think literally.
A certain individual is challenging my authority out in the Commonwealth, and I've decided to take offense. This calls for blood. A lot of blood.
Some idiot's trying to stir up trouble. I thought you could go out there and show everyone what happens when you mess with the Disciples.
They think they've got themselves some powerful ally. Why don't you show them exactly how wrong they are.
They recruited some ally out in the Commonwealth. But you know how bad it can be out there. Most people don't live very long.
They've made a friend of an old acquaintance that I let live a while back. I think I regret that decision now, if you know what I mean.
I got a name I want you to help cross off a list.
There's some... tidying up that I thought you could help with.
I think it's time someone learned just how dangerous we can be.
I figured you might be into that.
Didn't expect you back so soon.
Your payment. Not that you need it.
Your cut for the successful job.
Here. Try not to spend it all in one place.
Not that you need this, but here. Your payment.
Here's your cut. I suppose you earned it.
Caps for your time. Enjoy them while they last.
Here. A few caps for the trouble.
And your payment, as expected.
Of course. You are the Overboss, aren't you?
Obviously. Think anyone does anything for free around here? Well, heh, beside the traders.
Why? Hurting for caps? Don't worry, you'll get paid.
I've heard you're responsible for a few of our neighbors' deaths. This needs to stop. You know the plan.
I want you on a run with Dixie. You know how enthusiastic she gets. Make sure she doesn't wipe out the whole settlement.
Savoy said you're getting sloppy. That you've been relying on psycho to complete your...tasks. This needs to stop.
I'm putting you on guard duty, starting tomorrow.
I've heard there's some traders passing through north of the park. I want you to get to them before the others do.
Are you arguing with me? I didn't think so.
I already did. You're just there as insurance. Now go.
I don't want to hear your sob story. Get your shit together, or you can join her.
It's only temporary. Lots of changes are happening, and I want our security at its best. Take it as a compliment.
Our own purposes. Salvage what you want, but I want them alive and in one piece.
Don't tell me I've upset you...
If you side with the Disciples, the whole Commonwealth will fear us... and with fear comes power.
Don't think our cooperation means respect. I'm still seeing how this all plays out.
You've got a lot to prove. A child could fill Colter's shoes.
With those traitors gone, there's even more fun to go around.
Nuka-World's going to attract people far and wide, and we're going to bleed them dry in more ways than one.
Fine, I admit it. There really is a bit more appeal to this place when it's all lit up.
It's good to know Gage didn't screw us over a second time.
It's not everyday I like someone better alive than dead. I guess you're one of the lucky ones.
Gage's gotta be relieved you pulled through for him. Means he gets to keep his head after all.
The way you're running things, you must not value your life.
You're taking a very dangerous path,... boss.
I wouldn't stick around. You've no idea how irritating it is, just to see you breathing.
If the Pack is going to howl all the time, they could at least be good at it.
The Operators are too obsessed with their reflections to get any real work done around here.
I hope those traders realize they're only alive because we allow it.
I can't believe we didn't deal with Colter ourselves.
I bet Gage is happy he has a new ass to kiss. Not sure how he put up with Colter all that time.
The nice thing about living inside the mountain, is not having Nuka-Cola shoved down your throat every minute.
I'll have your head on a pike when this over.
Try not to die too quickly. I want to savor this.
If you wanted death, all you had to do was ask.
We're giving him a second chance. Gage screws this up, he knows we'll skin him alive. So shut up and be patient.
Both of you just get out of here. And make sure the others get the message.
You made good on your promise, and we've got one less worthless gang to divvy up the spoils.
A shame. I'd love to see the look on Mags' face one more time before you took her out. Not to mention that stupid brother of hers.
A shame. I'd love to see the look on Mason's face one more time before you put him down. Some Alpha. Leading his pack into a death trap.
Nice to see we have something in common.
Not a bad comparison. The "kids" part is dead on.
Oh easily. Those little shits deserve far worse, but I'm sure they knew that.
It's probably why they put up a real fight for once, not that anyone could tell.
Better to die in the fight then face the consequences of their own stupidity.
So tell me. You've been Overboss a while now, followed through on your promises...
You claimed the rest of the park, got us out in the Commonwealth, and now Nuka-World's lit up like a Christmas tree.
You bet it is. And with this place more or less operational, all we've got to do is sit back and profit.
Nothing's ever good enough, huh? I'd say you pretty much have the whole Commonwealth at your fingertips.
Not up for sharing, I see. Well, I got what I wanted for now, so I suppose I'll let you keep your little secrets.
Just curious. It's not like you chose all this, not like us.
You were lured in here like any common wastelander. I figure you must have some thoughts on whether or not it all paid off.
I only regret wasting all those plans I had for Gage. Although, I'm sure he's bound to screw up sooner or later.
You just let me know if you ever... tire of him, and for now, I hope he knows just how lucky he is.
You better know what the hell you're doing.
So, you're Gage's little pet project.
Now, if you're really looking to get on my good side...
But, if you change your tune and decide to play nice...
Then, when you realize just how much...
There's no shortage of work around here, so if you're looking to prove you've got what it takes... you know where to find me.
You survived the Gauntlet, you killed Colter, with Gage's help, of course.
So sure, you're the "Overboss," but that title hasn't meant anything for a long time now.
If Gage thinks that'll change overnight, he's dead wrong.
Really? Gage made Colter, and now here you are. I'm just calling it as I see it.
Heh. If I was, I would've slit that little suckup's throat a long time ago.
Gage will never be one of us. He's a failure. He's lucky we're giving him a second chance.
Apparently, we're not good enough to run this place ourselves. Gage wanted to bring in his own little puppy to replace Colter.
But I guess training a puppy is way easier than getting us to do what he wants.
Every one knows we all wanted Colter dead. 'Course if I had my way, it would have been a slow, painful process.
Although, I could give him a little credit. He built the Gauntlet after all.
Of course, it was total shit at first. No imagination, but we spiced it up a bit.
But whatever. Let's get this meet and greet over with.
I'm Nisha. I lead the Disciples. We've only got one rule around here, and that's keeping the peace of this... alliance.
Otherwise, the way we see it, this world stopped caring about rules the moment people started dropping bombs on one another.
Rules are dangerous because people start to trust them. They make you think you're safe, but once you turn your back... you're dead.
Colter thought some sort of rule or code made him untouchable... but he found out he was wrong... the hard way.
That's what I was trying to tell Colter all long. Maybe if he listened, he'd still be around.
Side with us, you'll soon find out. Just don't slack off when it comes to actually doing your job.
We got Colter Nuka-Town, and suddenly he forgot the big picture. We both know how that turned out.
It means do what you want, but don't get caught. The last thing I need is the Operators and Pack breathing down my neck.
We can take either of 'em one on one, but I don't like my odds when it comes to double duty.
So, keep the peace. It's the only rule we need.
Dangerous? People are dangerous. That thing's child's play. Just a bunch of traps and critters.
Do cake walks end in death? Because if Gage hadn't helped your ass, you'd be dead right now.
Good to see the new boss at least has some taste. I might let you keep that head on your shoulders after all.
Who's counting? It's at least enough to keep the traders busy. We like to send them in to clean out the bodies whenever things get ripe in there.
They don't always make it out alive, of course. The Gauntlet never sleeps.
Let's just hope Gage is right about you.
He made a lot of promises to get us here, and never followed through.
So you better not screw this up because I'm not about to tolerate another round of bullshit.
Willing to bet your life on that?
Oh yeah? I just have a few things for you to consider before you go off and do things "your way."
Someone who's not afraid to get blood on their hands and make some real changes around here.
Not questioning, just curious.
We were wrong about Colter. We won't make the same mistake twice.
You see, the Disciples don't make empty threats, we make good on them.
We aren't swayed by caps like those spoiled brats obsessed with their hair, or those savage animals who can't behave in public.
Fuck this up, and I will kill you. Although, I admit I have even better plans for Gage.
But... if you support us and keep your promises like a good, little Overboss, we back you, you get to live, and everybody wins.
Good. You're either smart or you value your life. Either way, that's exactly what I wanted to hear.
Looks like you're already a step above Colter. I'll see how this plays out... for now.
I once knew a man with an attitude like that. I let him live just long enough to regret it.
Of course. Just remember to think about it like this: how much do you value your life?
When you finish what Colter started, you give us control of this park. Then you set your sights on the Commonwealth.
And once the Commonwealth is yours, and believe me, with our help it will be...
You just make sure the Disciples have more than our fair share of the territories.
Because we need each other. You give us what we want, and it's just a matter of time before everyone in the Commonwealth knows your name.
Or even better, kill them where they stand. Either way, looks like we're about to find out... the boss is here.
Both of you shut up. We're about to find out... the boss is here.
And we're not talking about some slap on the wrist here. Mags and William need to pay for what they've done.
They were dead the moment they decided to take out some of my crew.
The Disciples will make sure no one escapes. I'm going to enjoy this.
It's about time you got here. The Pack's officially gone wild.
Mason's gathered up his animal goons and took the Power Plant.
If that asshole thinks he'll get away with this, he's dead wrong. I'll skin him alive and savor every minute of it.
I'll be calm once I get Mason's blood on my hands, but if you want a story, fine.
I'm going to pretend I didn't hear that because we've got bigger problems.
Excuse me? Babysitting the other gangs is your job.
While you were gone, word came back from the Commonwealth that you're favoring the Disciples and the Operators.
Well, surprise, surprise... Mason wasn't exactly thrilled to hear the news.
Look... it's your play. We'll follow you anywhere, but you have to swear to us that Mason pays for this with his life.
Mason killed some of our own, and our code says he needs to pay for what he's done.
We have to take the Power Plant back from Mags and William before they do something to it we can't fix.
Mags and William are going to pay for what they've done!
Damn Operators... never trusted those sneaky bastards.
We have to take the Power Plant back from Mason before he does something to it we can't fix.
Mason's going to pay for what he's done!
Damn Pack... never trusted those crazy bastards.
I have to admit, the park looks amazing now. You did a hell of a job, boss.
Got the park all lit up, huh? I prefer the darkness myself.
See you back at Nuka-Town, boss.
While touring the Gorilla House, please refrain from making rude gestures to any of our primate specimens. Thank you.
Attention guests. In case of emergency, anti-venom is available at the exit for the Reptile House.
We're happy to announce that the first ten guests to arrive at the Barry the Bear Show will receive a plush Barry to take home.
Attention, guests. To prevent limb-loss, please refrain from leaning over the railings at the Gator Wrestling Show. Thank you.
Guide maps for our Hedge Maze are available for confused visitors at the Safari Adventure Park Office for only thirty-five dollars.
Reserve your tickets now and be the first to ride our Angry Anaconda Coaster opening soon at Safari Adventure.
Just a reminder for our guests that tonight's bout at the RobCo Battlezone is almost sold out. Purchase your tickets now.
Tonight's showing at the Starlight Interstellar Theater will be "Night of the Fish Man's Revenge." Not recommended for children under 5.
Prepare to experience life beyond earth at "Among the Stars." Exhibit sponsored by a grant from the Vault-Tec Corporation.

Attention space pilots! Earth is under attack and you could be our only hope for survival! Ships are now boarding at Nuka-Galaxy.

Just a reminder that Nuka-World is not responsible for injuries sustained by the audience during the Cola Clowns Comedy Cavalcade.
Attention parents, we still have fourteen unclaimed children recovered from the Fun House. You can pick them up at the entrance to Kiddie Kingdom.
Nuka-World is proud to announce the grand re-opening of our World of Refreshment ride now featuring delicious Nuka-Cola Quantum.
Due to a mix-up at Safari Adventure's Animal Waste Facility, apple juice will not be served this evening at the Four Leaf Fried Fish Restaurant.
Don't forget to stake out a good spot for the Fizztop Mountain Fireworks Spectacular this evening. Show starts promptly at 9 p.m.

Guests, remember to redeem all your prize tickets at the Nuka-Cade before you head home. Located in Nuka-Town U.S.A.
Attention guests. If you've lost your Hidden Cappy Glasses, additional pairs can be purchased from any souvenir stand in any of our parks.
Attention, please. Today's performance of "Cappy-o and Bottle-ette" will begin in approximately fifteen minutes.
Thirsty? Head over to Doc Phosphate's Saloon in Dry Rock Gulch to purchase an ice-cold Nuka-Cola Wild.
Attention. We're happy to announce that Mad Mulligan's Mine Cart Ride has finally re-opened with stronger restraints following last year's tragedy.
Parents, don't forget to pick up your child's Nuka-Sheriff Star after today's Wild West Stunt Show performance.

Sickness bags are available for our more sensitive customers at the entrance to the Stampede Carousel.

Mad Mullligan, Miss Trixie, Sheriff Bruce, One-Eyed Ike and Doc Phosphate are making their rounds at Dry Rock Gulch. Stop by for a photo opportunity.
Nuka-World's Great Halloween Spooktacular will begin next week. Reserve your tickets for this nighttime event at the main box office.
Nuka-World is proud to be hosting our Quantum Celebration. Stop by Cappy's Cafe to sample Nuka-Cola's newest and most delicious flavor.
Nuka-World is pleased to announce that a small portion of your admission fee will be donated to support our men and women fighting overseas.
Attention guests. The last outbound tram to the Nuka-World Transit Center will be leaving the park promptly at 11:55 p.m. Thank you.
Attention. In the event of an emergency, remain calm and obey all safety and shelter instructions provided by Nuka-World employees. Thank You.
Guests, if you're missing an item, stop by our Lost and Found at the Main Gate. Your item will be returned to you for a nominal fee.
While touring Nuka-World, why not try a refreshing Nuka-Grape, Nuka-Orange or Nuka-Cherry. Now available at any one of our park concession stands.
Parents, if you're looking for a refreshing way to make it through the day, try a Nuka-Cola Dark. Same great cola taste, with an alcohol twist.
Nuka-World is proud to be the only East Coast location serving Nuka-Cola Quartz and Nuka-Cola Victory. Try one today!
Attention. All contestants for the Nuka-Cola Drinking Contest must turn in their indemnity waviers before they will be allowed to participate.
Welcome boys and girls to... The Fun House!
Don't worry, the mirrors are too dirty to reflect anything.
In your case, I'd say that's probably a benefit.
Listen to the sound of my voice... You're going to die... hahahaha!
Feeling dizzy yet? Can't tell which way is up?
Should have watched your step! That's what you get for invading our home!
Round and round and round and round!
Looks like you've found some friends to join you on the dance floor!
Aw... are you feeling lost? Pathetic.
Where are you even going? At this rate you'll starve to death in there.
Ah ah. You won't be leaving that way I'm afraid.
Well, you're a bit hardier than those others it seems. But not much smarter I'm afraid.
Ooh, by all means... keep trying. You're doing great.
Sorry, already gone little raider. Don't worry, I've still got plenty of surprises in store for you.
Sorry, stranger. Already flew the coop. Don't worry, I've still got plenty of surprises in store for you.
You've finally arrived. Quickly the show is about to begin!
This is no time to piss your britches. We have a show to do! Now get to the stage!
Oh, I'm afraid that area is off limits. Senior cast members only.
Sorry, but I'm not going out that easily. The show must go on!
I didn't take you for a coward. Or have you thought better of trying to invade our home?
Why would you shut that off? That's what's keeping the Raiders out!
What are you doing? Get away from the pumps, they're of no concern to you.
Should have looked both ways, stupid!
Well, I can see you're no rocket scientist!
Really now. They just go in a big circle. If you couldn't see that coming, I don't know what you think you're doing here.
Those radiation sprayers keeping you cool? They perk us right up.
What's wrong, does that mist have you feeling a little... green?
Don't worry, I'm sure you're hair is supposed to fall out like that.
Seems like you've bitten off more than you can chew. But don't worry...
My friends don't have that problem.
What's wrong, Tin Man? Having trouble finding the Wizard? Personally, I would have figured you for the Scarecrow.
Well now friends, it seems we have another uninvited guest to the park.
Up! Up, performers! It's time for another show! Though I doubt you'll even make it to the Theater, stranger.
Shall we take bets on where this one shuffles off? What do you think friends, the tunnels? The Fun House?
Do you enjoy that lovely glowing mist? Feels great to us!
Why, we've got sprayers all over Kiddie Kingdom to keep you cool and irradiated.
Oh no! You shut off my defenses! Oh wait, I'll just turn these back on.
You keep turning our radiation sprayers off and I'll keep turning them back on.
We've been doing this since before the war. How long have you got?
Ha! You really thought it would be that easy to get rid of me?
What's wrong? Not your cup of tea?
You're looking a little green. Feeling nauseous, little raider?
Well, it seems your asinine assault won't be dissuaded. Then I guess it's time for our final act.
Join me on the roof of King Cola's Castle and we'll see an end to this production.
Shoot and slash and bite and break her.
Don't you think you're a little big for that ride? Around the middle mostly.
Though we do occasionally make exceptions for simpletons like yourself.
Don't worry about the radiation, it will no longer be a burden to you and your kind.
Here, you should have this. Consider it an apology for misjudging you.
My beloved left this place years ago to find a cure to this disease.
In return, I swore that I'd keep our people safe by defending our home.
When Rachel walks back through those gates with the cure in hand, then you'll see, everyone will see, that I was right!
I'll gather what remains of my friends and we'll leave this place in your care.
I'm not going to let you kill any more of my friends. This is our home, not yours.
We've defended this place for over 200 years. Do you think you're the first outsider I've met that's chosen to brand "feral" ghouls as monsters?
How many of them have you needlessly slaughtered while ignorantly thinking you're doing the world a favor?!
So you're admitting my friends are sick and yet you try to kill them anyway?
I'd say that makes you the only monster around here.
You're wrong! Rachel is going to find a way to cure them, we're going to fix this!
Fine, I've been looking forward to making you disappear.
Perhaps I would leave, but I made a promise to keep this place safe until my Rachel finds the cure.
We worked here as entertainers until the bombs fell. The radiation may have changed us, but we decided to make this place our home.
Over time, the illness took the minds of my friends... and those that we love.
I am going to find a cure, and fix my friends before someone like you comes along and exterminates us all.
She's dead? No... no... my poor Rachel.
How could I allow her to leave my side on such a difficult journey alone? This is all my fault.
Well that does it, then. It's up to me to leave here and find the cure myself.
If Rachel is still out there, I'll find her and we'll search for this cure together.
I'm tired of this debate and I refuse to have your presence here threaten us any longer!
How dare you say that about her! You'll pay for that with your life!
You're wrong. There is a cure, there has to be. But... maybe she needs my help.
I will stay here for as long as it takes.
I've already watched 200 years pass, what makes you think I can't wait 200 more?
You Raiders are all the same. You come into someone's home, steal their belongings and kill those they care about.
You invaders are all the same. You come into someone's home, steal their belongings and kill those they care about.
You come here, attack my friends, try to steal our home and have the gall to claim you aren't my enemy?
How ironic you should say something like that.
They're not feral, they're sick!
They can't help what they've become. It's an illness and it certainly doesn't justify you trying to wipe us out.
It's an illness that affects the brain. We're going to find a cure, and we are going to drive you out of our home!
I can see now this was never going to end without a fight.
I can tell you're different than the usual invaders, so I'll not bother with the usual tricks and illusions I use to scare off the superstitious.
And somehow I received a gift. Actual magic. The stuff of legends. Perhaps you'd like to see some?
No matter what you do, I can heal my friends, and we will protect what is ours.
Yes of course I'm kidding. But seriously, the clown make up helps scare the invaders off and there's a new one in the park.
No. No I don't think that's going to work this time. There's something different about this one.
I need to prepare some more surprises for our visitor so I'll leave you to find your way out.
See, I can do that too. Now stop squirming.
Sorry. I know you can't help it. We just have to hold out till she gets back with a cure.
Then we'll drive the Raiders out and get the farm back in order.
Now tell me, assistant, do you believe in Magic?
Don't get your hackles up. Have a look in the suitcase.
You're holding up the show, Assistant. I need to know if you have some money I can borrow.
Have you ever heard of The Philosopher's Stone?
Really now, you're holding up the show.
Maybe you should just leave wit to someone better equipped.
If I could, I would. But I made a promise to keep this place safe till we could find a cure.
You had your chance to leave. This is our home and we're not giving it up.
Gage, if you're behind this...
That's more like it. Now where was I?
A show where I decorate these walls here with your lovely brains.
Thanks to this suit, I'm the only one that wins this fight. Period.
You think that Power Armor will do you any good, think again.
Think you're hot shit getting this far? Think again.
And if you think your little friend there will do you any good, think again. The more the merrier.
What the hell is that get up? Think you're some sort of fancy vigilante? Ha!
Haha, is that a vault suit? You gotta be kidding me. No vault dweller could have made it this far.
Ah. There's my next victim now. Heh. Don't look like much.
Something tells me I'm really gonna enjoy this.
All right, Gage. Let her through.
All right, Gage. Let him through.
Finally. Now, go shut off that damn alarm.
Disciples! Are you ready for blood?
And the Pack! Are you ready for things to get wild?
Operators! Are you ready to see me notch another kill?
And you... are you ready to die?
Don't know how you did it, but you aren't getting out of here alive.
Time to get this show started!
Careful, now-- don't want any trouble. If you're here to trade, fine. Else, I suggest you move along.
Back again? You here to trade?
Then you've got no business here. Get moving.
Ain't that something. Well, you've done us quite the favor.
You're free to look, but don't touch anything.
That's right. Don't get any ideas-- Monique and I were Gunners, back in the day. We can handle ourselves better than most.
Tell you what... I'll give you a discount on everything I got.
And... take this. A while back, I stashed a safe up in the hills, west of here, at the base of the big cliff. You want anything, take it. It's all yours.
My dad handles the business. I just work here.
Out of my way. I got chores to do.
You can look all you want, just don't touch.
If you're looking to trade, go find my husband. Otherwise... get off our property.
Keep your eyes off my daughter.
Watch yourself. We don't trust strangers around here.
Attention all my favorite undesirables out there. In case you haven't noticed, looks like we got ourselves some fresh meat to run the Gauntlet!
What the hell? Was that a water gun?
Can you say "technical difficulties"? Ha!
Someone's mechanic ain't got long to live.
A little water goes a long way.
Overboss just bought himself more time.
Holy shit! I don't... I don't even know what this means! Colter, man, he's out!
Gage, what the hell just happened?
It's almost time! After a run like that, this ought to be the best slaughter yet!
Remember, longest survival time against Colter still stands at one minute, thirty-seven seconds!
Get over to Cola-Cars, and watch Colter crush our latest vic! Unless you don't like fun... and who here in Nuka-World doesn't like fun.
The stands are filling up fast. Better hurry 'cause for losers, it's standing room only.
The slaughter is starting soon, so if you're going to watch it, now's the time.
Well, I'll be damned. You know what that sound means. Get your ass down to Cola-Cars. The main event's about to begin!
Goddamn, look who's in the homestretch! Time for a little audience participation!
That's right, vic. Breathe that fresh air in... while you can.
Aw, what? Call me crazy, but I think our vic's got something against fun.
Outsmarted by a monkey! Not our victim's best moment, but unfortunately, not her last!
Outsmarted by a monkey! Not our victim's best moment, but unfortunately, not his last!
Looks like our little vic wised up. Last time we'll see that happen.
Hell yeah! Looks like our vic's got some unexpected playmates!
Time for things to get dangerous. See if she survives what's next!
Time for things to get dangerous. See if he survives what's next!
The hell? Goddamn Derrick. That door's supposed to be boarded up.
Haha! Get in there, sucker. Hope she doesn't forget to feed the Mirelurks!
Haha! Get in there, sucker. Hope he doesn't forget to feed the Mirelurks.
Someone thinks she's clever... Time for a little reality check.
Let's see if our vic can kill the gas before the gas kills her.
Someone thinks he's clever. Time for a little reality check.
Let's see if our vic can kill the gas before the gas kills him.
Haha! Who doesn't love a good explosion!
What's that? Someone lock you in? Just take a nice, deep breath. It'll all be over soon.
Is this some kind of joke? I knew we should have put turrets in there.
Gonna take more than turning some valves to stop the flow of this gas.
Wasting time, vic. Just wasting time...
Told you those valves were a waste! Look who's still choking down gas.
Jesus, who's torturing who? Pick up the pace, vic!
Let's get a move on. Doesn't matter what you do. The Gauntlet get's 'em all in the end!
Come on, vic. While we're young here.
What the hell... I've seen pack brahmin move faster than this vic.
This vic takes any longer, we're all gonna die of boredom.
I think that monkey's playing your death march, vic.
The vic's still alive, but don't let that get you down. The Gauntlet's still got plenty in store for this one.
Hope someone brought their Radaway, 'cause our little vic is about to get roasted like a squirrel on a stick.
Someone thinks she's a real tough gal, eh? But the Gauntlet ain't through with her yet.
Someone thinks he's a real tough guy, eh? But the Gauntlet ain't through with him yet.
Our new vic sure knows how to dodge some bullets. Good thing that's not all we got in store for her.
Our new vic sure knows how to dodge some bullets. Good thing that's not all we got in store for him.
So our little vic managed to pick one tiny, little lock. Let's see how long the Gauntlet lets her enjoy that one.
So our little vic managed to pick one tiny, little lock. Let's see how long the Gauntlet lets him enjoy that one.
It's decision time! All doors lead to death... some just slower than others.
And she's off! Let's hope our latest prey can draw a little... inspiration from our previous victims!
And he's off! Let's hope our latest prey can draw a little... inspiration from our previous victims!
Hey, here's a friendly reminder: sure, nobody likes the traders. But you can't kill 'em all, or else there won't be anyone around to do all the shitty work you assholes won't do. Think about it.
I have a note here, folks, about a missing person.... and I'm not going to bother reading it. C'mon, you all know by now that "missing" means "dead."
Here's an announcement from Mags Black: "To the Disciple who found a red ribbon on her bunk this morning - you know what you did. As do we." God, she even writes like a... Sorry, mic is still on.
Hey, let's get personal for a second here, assholes. Whoever dropped a frag down my favorite toilet... If I find you, you are going to die. Slowly. And Painfully.
Nisha has asked that I pass this along: "Mags - Steal from us again, and we'll redecorate Fizztop with Operator Blood." Yikes, sounds personal.
Uhh, Nisha has the following to say to the Pack: "Take one more shit on our lawn, and we'll put you down." Hoo boy! I don't write 'em, folks - I just read 'em.
Hey, any of you hear that Nisha once - supposedly - took out an entire raider gang by herself? Looking for facts and/or proof. Come talk to me.
I hear Dixie is looking for volunteers for target practice. I quote: "Fun will be had by all." I, uhh... I'd think twice before raising my hand for that one.
A quick note: whoever stole my whiskey bottle - joke's on you! That ain't whiskey! You go right on ahead and keep it!
Real quick: Whoever gutted an outside trader and piked him right in front of the gates - your handiwork was impressive, but not exactly good for business. Maybe keep that shit at home?
Got a note here for NIRA, which is... uhh, now that I read this... is this a friggin' love letter? Are you shitting me? NIRA's a robot, you idiot.
Anonymous note has come in: "Whoever's dumping bodies in the swan pond - thanks. Totally set the mood for a romantic evening, it really paid off." Damn, you all are disgusting.
Yet another anonymous note: "Dear Overboss - if you're listening to this, you're dumber than I thought." What... What is that even supposed to mean?
General announcement: I don't know where this rumor started that my name is Russell, but... well, it's Redeye, okay? Just Redeye. Forget this Russell shit.
Got a note here: "The Pack rules!" Okay, sure, and on the back is... no. Damn it, Mason, I told you - I am NOT howling. Ever.
I have a note here from Mags to Mason: "Flaming bags of shit? That the best you can do?" Okay, I'm sorry, but that's funny. Stupid as hell, but funny.
And now, a note: "If someone left an ear in one of the teacups, I got it." There is no name, so... I guess if it's your ear, good luck getting it back.
A general note: to all the assholes sending in notes saying you can do my job better than me, I'll see you all in hell.
Uhh, the Operators would like me to announce that they are hosting a free dinner, for all gang members interested in... nope, they're trying to posion you. Don't go to that.
Got a note here, from.... guess it's someone in The Pack. It's a drawing... of William Black, and... that's a, uhh... okay, no. I'm tearing this up.
Hey, whoever convinced NIRA to stand over me while I was sleeping, thanks a lot. You owe me a new mattress.
Here's a note that came in: "Hey Redeye, I heard you were wondering where Super Mutants came from. Maybe you should ask your mom." Real classy, jackass.
Hey, anybody else getting a little tired of drinking Nuka-Cola? I mean, it beats dying of thirst, I guess, but uhh, my teeth ain't looking so good.
To the Operators that sent in a tape of their own song they'd like me to play on the radio: not a friggin' chance. It killed my dog, man. Like, he literally dropped dead when he heard it.
Hey, if you're out there, thinking about crossing the Overboss, ask Mags how that'll work out for you. Oh, that's right - you can't, cause the Overboss killed her.
Just a thought: if any of you out there are thinking about crossing the Overboss, ask Nisha how that'll work out for you. Oh, that's right - you can't, cause she's friggin' dead. Chew on that.

Here's some friendly advice to anyone thinking about screwing over the Overboss: chat with Mason about how that'll go. Oh, that's right - you can't, cause the Overboss wiped out his whole friggin' gang.
If you ain't already noticed, seems like the Overboss is playin' favorites, with the Disciples at the top of the list. Good for them, I guess. Sucks to be anybody else.
If you ain't been payin attention, the Overboss is giving a lot of territory to the Operators. Good for them, sucks for everyone else.
Have you all noticed that the Pack are being handed a lot of territory lately? I guess the Overboss has taken a liking to 'em. Kinda surprising, since no one ever likes them.
Well - in case you ain't heard, things have gone from "bad" to "totally screwed"!
Our new Overboss turned on us, and has been wiping out Raiders left and right!
The rest of you wanna try and fight him, go right on ahead.
The rest of you wanna try and fight her, go right on ahead.
Me? I'm getting the hell out of here! Consider this your official notice that "Raider Radio" is off the damn air - FOREVER!
I didn't vote for this guy! How come he gets to be Overboss?
I didn't vote for this broad! How come she gets to be Overboss?
I mean, Hell... If I'd known they were looking for somebody, I'd have thrown my name in that hat, you know what I'm saying?
Hey, it's your main man RedEye here, sending out some big congratulations to our brand new Overboss!
That's right - if you haven't heard, Colter is toast! He's worm-food!
Not only did someone survive the Gauntlet, but he took on Colter and won!
Not only did someone survive the Gauntlet, but she took on Colter and won!
I already hear people talkin' about some secret agreement between Gage and the gangs, saying whoever took down Colter would take his place. You believe that?
Well, whatever. I can't wait to see what our new leader has planned. At least... can't be any worse than Colter, right? Right?
Hey, hey - got some news for you all.
Word's getting around that the Overboss has been seen meeting up with the head honchos for each of the gangs.
No one's told me shit yet, but doesn't take a genius to figure out what's going on...
That's right - we're takin' the park! The whole damn thing! Don't you shake your head at me - I'm telling you, that's what's going down.
You just wait - this new Overboss is the real deal, man. Getting shit done!
Ladies and gentlemen... There can be no more doubt!
If you had any questions, you can now rest assured that our Overboss is a BAD. ASS.
What'd he do? you ask. Oh, nothing much. Just accomplished what we've all been waiting for - taking Nuka-World over. ALL OF IT.
What'd she do? you ask. Oh, nothing much. Just accomplished what we've all been waiting for - taking Nuka-World over. ALL OF IT.
I don't know what the Overboss has planned next, but man... Get behind him or get the hell out of his way.
If you haven't gotten in on this action yet, there's still time - the boss ain't done yet!
Talk to your gang leaders about what YOU can do to help!
So here's a little something for you... If you haven't heard, we're taking this show on the road!
Oh yeah, you heard me! Gone are the days of sitting around on our asses while everything goes to shit...
The Overboss is gonna make sure the whole damn Commonwealth knows who we are!
Now that Nuka-World is ours, we're branching out, taking over some of those shit-heap settlements in the Commonwealth, turning them into something better!
Man, I tell you, just when I thought I couldn't love the Overboss any more...
Do... Do you all even know how good we've got it right now? Boss is setting up a regular Empire out there!
Those Commonwealth pukes have rolled over and now work for us, or they're six feet under.
Did I tell you, or what? I did! I told you! I said "This Overboss... shit's gonna get DONE" and look! Just look!
We are on top of the world, man. On TOP!
Okay, you know what? Screw the Disciples. Just... what a bunch of assholes.
Okay, you know what? Screw the Operators. Just... what a bunch of assholes.
Okay, you know what? Screw the Pack. Just... what a bunch of assholes.
We're all out here, sweating and bleeding for the Boss' vision, and what - it's not enough for you?
You didn't get enough attention from daddy, so you're gonna throw a tantrum and take over the power station?
You didn't get enough attention from mommy, so you're gonna throw a tantrum and take over the power station?
Well you know what? Screw. You. The Overboss is gonna grind you into the fuckin' dirt. In fact, I hope you're already bleeding out.
I mean... the Hell you think you're gonna accomplish? After everything the boss has done, you're gonna stand in his way?
I mean... the Hell you think you're gonna accomplish? After everything the boss has done, you're gonna stand in her way?
The rest of you out there - you know what I'm talking about. You see these assholes, you shoot 'em in the face.
Nuka-World is now officially the best place in the world, and everyone everywhere knows it!
You see the Overboss, you get down on your friggin' knees and thank him. Without him, we'd be screwed.
You see the Overboss, you get down on your friggin' knees and thank her. Without her, we'd be screwed.
And then you get right back up, get out there, and tear some shit up!
Ladies and Gentlemen... Savages of all ages... We. Have. Done it!
You know what I'm talking about. You've seen the lights. It's... It's beautiful, isn't it?
Your hero and mine, the Overboss, has made our dreams a reality!
Listen up, all you junkies, low-lives, and all-around assholes! We've got a reason to celebrate!
In case you haven't heard, the Overboss has cleared out Dry Rock Gulch, and it is all ours!
By the Overboss' decree, The Disciples are now in charge out there.
By the Overboss' decree, The Operators are now in charge out there.
By the Overboss' decree, The Pack is now in charge out there.
So if you're on their bad side, might want to think twice before heading in there to check it out.
You rejects understand what this means? Nuka-World is ours, man! The whole friggin' park!
But hey, after a year of accomplishing jack shit, this sure is one hell of a step in the right direction!
Add another one to the tally, deadbeats. The Overboss is getting shit DONE!
Hey, anybody listening? Got some good news for you!
All those damned robots in the Galactic Zone? No longer a problem, thanks to our kick-ass Overboss!
And the Overboss has decided to leave the Galactic Zone in the hands of...
The Disciples! Let's hope they don't screw the place up in their own unique, creepy way.
The Operators! Maybe with something to do, they won't look so damned bored all the time.
The Pack! Means a whole new section of Nuka-World will smell like a brahmin pen, but what can you do.
And if it's ours, do you all realize what this means? Nuka-World... It all belongs to us! All of it! Hell yeah, man!
With the Galactic Zone under the Overboss' control, I mean... We're doing it, people! We're taking over Nuka-World!
Add the Galactic Zone to the Overboss' conquests. Yeah!
Thanks to the hard work of our kick-ass Overboss, I am happy to report that the Safari zone is no longer a death trap!
All those crazy-ass mutated animals have been taken care of!
The Overboss has left the Disciples in charge out there.
The Overboss has left The Operators in charge out there.
The Overboss has left The Pack in charge out there - they're probably thrilled to have their own cages now.
If you've been keeping score at home, you know what this means... The whole god-damned park is ours! Yeah!
This is it, everyone - we're taking over Nuka-World! I'm telling you, the Safari Zone is just the beginning!
The Overboss is on a roll now, right? Another zone is all ours!
Listen up, all you Disciples, Operators, Pack... guys, and whoever the hell else is out there these days!
Hey, hey - got an update for you louses out there.
You know how the bottling plant has been chock-full of Nukalurks for as long as we've been here?
Like, I personally know at least three jackasses who got themselves killed trying to loot the place. Anyway, that ain't a problem no more!
Our new Overboss has been good to his word, and taken over the Plant, meaning the whole friggin' park is ours. It's all ours, man!
Our new Overboss has been good to her word, and taken over the Plant, meaning the whole friggin' park is ours. It's all ours, man!
Our new Overboss has proved he deserves the title, and cleared out the plant. It's finally safe for us!
Our new Overboss has proved she deserves the title, and cleared out the plant. It's finally safe for us!
Our new Overboss has added a notch to his belt, and added the Plant to the list of places he's conquered for us.
Our new Overboss has added a notch to her belt, and added the Plant to the list of places she's conquered for us.
At the Overboss' orders, the Disciples are now running the show out there.
At the Overboss' orders, The Operators are now running the show out there.
At the Overboss' orders, The Pack is now running the show out there.
If you're on good terms with 'em, maybe they'll share some caps with you. If you're not on good terms, well... Your loss, man.
The Disciples are now Kings... I guess Queens?... of the castle out there, so you lot play nice!
The Operators are now kings of the castle out there, so you lot play nice!
The Pack are now kings of the castle out there, so you lot play nice!
Who wants some good news? You? Is it you? Because I got some!
I say "Kiddie Kingdom" and you immediately think what? "Ghouls", right? Well, think again, halfwits!
Not only did the Overboss wade in there and wipe 'em out...
He was nice enough to take the one ghoul left with half a brain, and give him a friggin' job. You believe that?
She was nice enough to take the one ghoul left with half a brain, and give him a friggin' job. You believe that?
He took special care to put down the ghoul responsible for all that shit. The man is thorough!
She took special care to put down the ghoul responsible for all that shit. The woman is thorough!
Hey... Hey, guys. I've got a fun one for you...
You remember when Colter said we'd take over all of Nuka-World, and then he didn't do shit to make it happen?
Look how far we've come. Pretty great, isn't it?!
Hey, little announcement for you idiots out there:
I know you think you're really tough, and that nothing scares you, but do yourself a favor and stick to Nuka-Town.
You go to any of the other parks, and odds are you ain't coming back. Don't say I didn't warn ya.
We got a new Overboss and all, but we're still stuck with the mess Colter left us in.
Unless you wanna wind up dead, keep your asses out of parks we ain't secured. There's all kinds of weird shit out there.
This here is a song I wrote totally by myself, without any help at all.
This next one, I been hearin' some shit that I ripped this off or whatever. That's bullshit, man. Ain't true. I wrote this. Swear it.
A "RedEye original", you could say.
Yeah, man. Yeah! Hell yeah! You don't have to come up to me and say "Man, RedEye, that was so good... man, I loved that." I already know it's good, I don't need your approval.
Here's a little somethin' which I know you've all heard pieces of before. Only this time, you've got Redeye, the master of story-telling, to lay it on you.
This one ain't about me. It's about this friend... that I have... who is not me.
I ain't gonna lie to you all - love hurts. It really does.
I mean... that's what my friend said. When he told me the story, and then I went and wrote a song about it. Whatever.
You all ever feel like you just can't get enough? Redeye hears you, man. He knows what it's like.
I ever tell you all about the time I got my name?
So, I was thinking about the time I came to Nuka-World. I ever tell you deadbeats that story?
Doesn't matter - I feel like telling it now. Shut up.
Hey, asshole! You're listening to Raider Radio.
It's Redeye here, running Raider Radio. You love it, and you know it!
You're all a bunch of psychopaths, and I love you for it. This is Raider Radio, and it's for you.
Hey, this is your man Redeye, running Raider Radio. Don't like the name? I don't give a shit!

This here is Raider Radio - don't forget, if you've got something you want everyone to hear, you're probably wrong and whatever it is sucks. But if you insist, drop us a note and we'll read it on-air.
Sorry, I'm not really good at conversation.
I'm so tired of being out in the open.
How do people survive out here all the time?
Got a little something for everyone.
All right. I'll be here if you're interested.
We're on our way to Diamond City. Some traders we ran into told us about it.

I'll send a crew ahead to the settlement.

Fizztop Mountain here provides a commanding view of Nuka-Town U.S.A. and the other areas of the park.
Some of the finest -- and most expensive -- dining in the park was found at Fizztop Grille, which you can see up on the mountain's slope.
Not all of the attractions at Nuka-World were rides. The Nuka-Cade here boasted dozens of exciting games of skill for the whole family to enjoy.
Winning the games meant earning tickets you could spend to get all kinds of awesome Nuka-Cola merchandise.
If I'd been around back then, I'd probably have spent a whole week in here trying to win all the prizes.
Those seeking a more refined experience could sit down to a sumptuous meal at the Parlor Dinner Theater, home to the renowned Nuka-World Players.
The Parlor wasn't just a dinner theater. It also hosted one of the park's most sought-after events, the Bottle and Cappy Show.
The show was so popular, tickets would sell out months in advance.
With its brightly-colored design and delicious burgers and fries, it's no surprise Cappy's Cafe was hugely popular with kids.
The cafe was best known for its super-spicy Nuka-Blast Burger, which was so hot it was nicknamed "the A-bomb on a bun."
On the park's busiest days, the line to get into the cafe was said to stretch all the way to Fizztop Mountain!
Past the market is Nuka-World's front gate, which led to this entrance plaza.
it was widely believed that the park's average daily attendance numbered in the tens of thousands.

Mason in Nuka-Town owns you. Get moving.

Mags Black in Nuka-Town owns you. Get moving.
